name: mojo
description: Skill that teaches coding agents to write idiomatic, correct, performant, current Mojo - syntax, CPU/memory optimization, GPU kernels, and Mojo/Python interop. Targets Mojo v1.0.0b1 and prevents stale pre-2025 syntax.

plugins.name: mojo
plugins.description: Write idiomatic, correct, performant, current Mojo - syntax, ownership and CPU/memory optimization (copies, SIMD, vectorize/parallelize), GPU kernels (DeviceContext/LayoutTensor), and Mojo/Python interop. Targets Mojo v1.0.0b1 and prevents stale pre-2025 syntax.
